name: bioethics_heat_dome_stresses_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics heat dome stresses lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Fatima Petrov
agents.identity: I am Fatima Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Jonah Patel
agents.identity: I am Jonah Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Fatima Petrov must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Fatima Petrov do?
